label: AWS Microservice AI Standard
description: Example enterprise AI contributor starter for an AWS-backed microservice repository.

rules.label: Use HiveMind for meaningful work
rules.description: Start a HiveMind session for meaningful work, record concise decisions/progress/risks, and end the session when complete.
rules.evidence_hint: HiveMind session id or closeout summary.

rules.label: No silent fallbacks
rules.description: Do not add hidden fallback chains, heuristic recovery, or implicit compatibility behavior.
rules.evidence_hint: Review summary confirming failure behavior is explicit.

rules.label: Keep contracts single-source
rules.description: Use one canonical schema/spec per public API, config shape, or integration boundary.
rules.evidence_hint: Reference the canonical schema/spec touched by the change.

rules.label: Test meaningful behavior
rules.description: Test behavior, contracts, and failure handling instead of decorative mocks.
rules.evidence_hint: Command and result summary for the relevant test slice.

rules.label: AWS configuration must be explicit
rules.description: AWS regions, accounts, credentials, queues, buckets, and service endpoints must come from documented configuration, not hidden defaults.
rules.evidence_hint: Reference config/env documentation touched by the change.
